page.primary_keyword: marbella full day yoga retreat at sea
page.title: Marbella Full-Day Yoga Retreat at Sea: Wellness on the Water

data.meta_description: Book a marbella full day yoga retreat at sea with yoga, paddleboarding, and lunch aboard a Mangusta 80. €4,719 for 12 guests from Puerto Banús.
data.summary: A premium wellness experience combining yoga, paddleboarding, and a gourmet lunch aboard a Mangusta 80 motor yacht from Puerto Banús. This full-day retreat is designed for groups of up to 12 seeking relaxation on the Costa del Sol.
key_facts: Price: €4,719 (includes skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, VAT)
Boat: Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) with a jet ski included free
Activities: yoga session on deck, paddleboarding, swimming, optional jet ski
Lunch: Mediterranean menu served onboard (fresh seafood, salads, paella)
Inclusions: licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, cava, snacks
No extra fees: all taxes and insurance covered in the price

faq.q: What is included in the marbella full day yoga retreat at sea?
faq.a: The retreat includes a licensed skipper, fuel, unlimited water and soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, and Spanish VAT (21%). A yoga session led by a certified instructor, paddleboarding gear, and a Mediterranean lunch are also provided. A jet ski is included free of charge for the day.

faq.q: How many people can join the yoga retreat?
faq.a: The Mangusta 80 accommodates up to 12 guests. This makes it ideal for small groups of friends, wellness retreats, or corporate team-building events. The spacious deck and flybridge provide ample room for yoga mats and relaxation.

faq.q: Where does the retreat depart from?
faq.a: All retreats depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella's famous marina. You'll meet at the boat at 09:45 for a 10:00 departure. The marina is easily accessible by car or taxi from Marbella centre, the Golden Mile, and nearby resorts.

faq.q: Do I need to bring my own yoga mat?
faq.a: No, yoga mats and all necessary equipment are provided onboard. We recommend bringing sunscreen, a hat, a swimsuit, and a towel. The boat has shaded areas and air conditioning for comfort between activities.

The Mediterranean lunch includes a selection of fresh seafood, mixed salads, paella, and seasonal fruit. Vegetarian, vegan, and gluten-free options are available on request. Dietary requirements should be confirmed at least 48 hours before departure.

faq.q: Can we swim or use the jet ski during the retreat?
faq.a: Yes, the itinerary includes a stop at Cala del Faro or Cala Cortés for swimming, paddleboarding, and jet skiing. The jet ski is included free with the Mangusta 80, and life jackets are provided for all water activities.

faq.q: Is the yoga retreat suitable for beginners?
faq.a: Absolutely. The yoga session is led by a certified instructor and is suitable for all levels, from complete beginners to advanced practitioners. The focus is on relaxation, breathwork, and gentle stretching in a serene sea setting.

faq.q: How do I book the marbella full day yoga retreat at sea?
faq.a: You can book via WhatsApp or through the contact form on our website. A 50% deposit is required to secure the date, with the balance due 7 days before departure. We recommend booking at least two weeks in advance, especially during peak season (June–September).

data.body_html:
Escape the crowds and find your centre on a marbella full day yoga retreat at sea. This exclusive wellness experience combines a morning yoga session on the deck of a luxury motor yacht, paddleboarding in crystal-clear coves, and a Mediterranean lunch—all from the glamorous setting of Puerto Banús. Designed for groups of up to 12, the retreat runs from 10:00 to 18:00 and offers a seamless blend of relaxation, movement, and coastal exploration.

Your Floating Yoga Studio: The Mangusta 80

The retreat takes place aboard the Mangusta 80, a 24-metre open sport yacht with a maximum capacity of 12 guests. Its spacious flybridge and aft deck provide the perfect platform for yoga mats, while the forward sunpad offers a quiet spot for meditation. The boat is equipped with a jet ski (included free), paddleboards, and snorkelling gear—so after your practice, you can dive straight into the Mediterranean.

Itinerary: A Day of Wellness on the Water

Your day begins at 09:45 at Puerto Banús. After a welcome drink and safety briefing, you'll cruise west along the coast towards Cala del Faro or Cala Cortés—two sheltered coves known for their turquoise waters and calm conditions. The 45-minute journey offers views of the Sierra Blanca mountains and the Marbella coastline.

  • 10:30 – Yoga & Breathwork: A 60-minute session led by a certified instructor, focusing on gentle flows, pranayama, and savasana with the sound of waves.
  • 11:45 – Paddleboarding & Swimming: Explore the cove on a paddleboard or float in the calm waters. Life jackets and instruction provided.
  • 13:00 – Mediterranean Lunch: A freshly prepared meal served on the aft deck—think grilled fish, paella, salads, and chilled cava.
  • 14:30 – Free Time: Use the jet ski, sunbathe on the flybridge, or take a siesta in the air-conditioned cabin.
  • 16:00 – Return Cruise: Slow cruise back towards Puerto Banús, with a final toast as you pass the Golden Mile.
  • 18:00 – Disembark: Back at the marina, feeling restored.

What's Included in the Price

The all-inclusive price of €4,719 covers the Mangusta 80 for 8 hours, a licensed skipper, fuel, unlimited water and soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, and Spanish VAT (21%). The yoga instructor, paddleboards, and jet ski are also included. Lunch is an additional €35 per person and must be pre-ordered.

Why Choose a Full-Day Retreat Over a Standard Charter?

A standard boat rental is great for parties, but a yoga retreat adds structure, purpose, and a deeper connection to the sea. You'll leave feeling stretched, calm, and nourished—not just sun-kissed. The small group size (max 12) ensures personalised attention from the instructor and crew. Plus, the Mangusta 80's jet ski adds a dash of adrenaline if you want it.

Practical Info: What to Bring and How to Prepare

All yoga equipment is provided. You just need to bring a swimsuit, towel, sunscreen (reef-safe preferred), a hat, and a light jacket for the return breeze. The boat has a shaded saloon and air conditioning, so you can always escape the sun. Dietary requirements for lunch should be confirmed at least 48 hours in advance.

Book Your Marbella Full-Day Yoga Retreat at Sea

This experience is available from April to October, subject to weather. To secure your date, contact us via WhatsApp or the booking form on our website. A 50% deposit is required, with the balance due 7 days before departure. For more ideas on how to spend your day on the water, explore our full range of boat rentals in Marbella.

Frequently Asked Questions

What is included in the marbella full day yoga retreat at sea?

The retreat includes a licensed skipper, fuel, unlimited water and soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, and Spanish VAT (21%). A yoga session led by a certified instructor, paddleboarding gear, and a Mediterranean lunch are also provided. A jet ski is included free of charge for the day.

How many people can join the yoga retreat?

The Mangusta 80 accommodates up to 12 guests. This makes it ideal for small groups of friends, wellness retreats, or corporate team-building events. The spacious deck and flybridge provide ample room for yoga mats and relaxation.

Where does the retreat depart from?

All retreats depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella's famous marina. You'll meet at the boat at 09:45 for a 10:00 departure. The marina is easily accessible by car or taxi from Marbella centre, the Golden Mile, and nearby resorts.

Do I need to bring my own yoga mat?

No, yoga mats and all necessary equipment are provided onboard. We recommend bringing sunscreen, a hat, a swimsuit, and a towel. The boat has shaded areas and air conditioning for comfort between activities.

What is the lunch menu?

The Mediterranean lunch includes a selection of fresh seafood, mixed salads, paella, and seasonal fruit. Vegetarian, vegan, and gluten-free options are available on request. Dietary requirements should be confirmed at least 48 hours before departure.

Can we swim or use the jet ski during the retreat?

Yes, the itinerary includes a stop at Cala del Faro or Cala Cortés for swimming, paddleboarding, and jet skiing. The jet ski is included free with the Mangusta 80, and life jackets are provided for all water activities.

Is the yoga retreat suitable for beginners?

Absolutely. The yoga session is led by a certified instructor and is suitable for all levels, from complete beginners to advanced practitioners. The focus is on relaxation, breathwork, and gentle stretching in a serene sea setting.

How do I book the marbella full day yoga retreat at sea?

You can book via WhatsApp or through the contact form on our website. A 50% deposit is required to secure the date, with the balance due 7 days before departure. We recommend booking at least two weeks in advance, especially during peak season (June–September).
